    Description
     
    Game(Board board, Player player, List<Enemy> enemies, int totalRegularRewards, int totalBonusRewards, List<Position> keyPositions, List<Position> trapPositions)
    Constructs a new game controller with the given board, player, enemies, and initial reward/trap metadata

    Constructs a new game controller with the given board, player, enemies, initial reward/trap metadata, and time source.

    Constructors in ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.enemies with parameters of type Board
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    Enemy(Board board)
    The Enemy constructor takes a pointer to the board.
     
    Goblin(Board board, Position pos)
    Creates a goblin at the given starting position on the board.
     
    Ogre(Board board, Position... route)
    Creates an ogre that follows the given patrol route.
     
    Ogre(Board board, Position first_position, Direction direction)
    Creates an ogre that patrols back and forth in a straight line.
